title: Pelmeni (Dumplings)
description: This pack replaces the Golden Apple and the Enchanted Golden Apple with a beautiful high resolution Dumpling (Pelmen).
body:
## Introducing Pelmeni (Dumplings)!
This texture pack is for all of you who love pelmeni, or are obsessed with pandas who like dumplings. The reason it is high resolution, because a 16x16 texture would look unrecognizable, it would look like a white blob.
## Support or Issues?
If you have any problems, feature suggestions or other you can join my helpful [Discord](https://discord.gg/XGxBGrJjkA).
